messages.author: mackenzie
messages.text: I hope this is the correct place to ask. I was wondering what the plans are for a rust crate (either bindings to another library, or all rust) that would enable rust app development for meshcore radios. I have a chat app written in rust, using Iced for GUI, and wondered if in the future I would be able to add support for MeshCore devices to it. I could help a little, but not do all the heavy lift to create and maintain such a crate. Thanks in advance for any news or thoughts
messages.content_html: I hope this is the correct place to ask. messages.author: recrof
messages.text: hello, this forum is not for questions but for projects built on/made with meshcore. ask in #development . I believe @hpux735 was doing rust meshcore library?
